biography: Stuart Maxheimer is an award winning actor. He has been acting for 9 years and has studied the Meisner Technique at Baron Brown Studio In LA. He has more recently studied with Jordan-Woods Robinson of Book From Tape and Kimberly Crandall of ActorSite. He has played numerous roles in film and television, both comedic and dramatic as well as shot commercials with such stars as Steve Harvey, Shakira, Ronald Acuna Jr, Nestor Cortez Jr, and Gary Koch.
name: Stuart Maxheimer
